---
title: "Blog"
listing:
  contents: posts
  sort: "date desc"
  type: grid              # This changes the list into a card grid
  grid-columns: 3         # Adjusts layout for desktop (3 columns)
  fields: [image, date, title, reading-time, description] # Clean metadata
  image-height: 200px     # Keeps cards uniform
  image-placeholder: /assets/css/logo_bi_whiteteal_shad.svg # Prevents layout shifts
  categories: true
  sort-ui: true
  filter-ui: true
  feed: true
---
